queue.task: Review Apr 22 results (119 tasks, HAVING rewrite, 3293 LOC db.js). Set direction: depth on HenryDB + neural-net.
queue.summary: Reviewed Apr 22 results. Queue priorities confirmed: test sweep → extraction → Volcano CTE → neural-net. No queue changes needed.

queue.task: Run full 868-file test suite, triage failures, fix regressions from HAVING/Volcano/extraction changes
queue.summary: Full 868-file test suite: 7370 pass, 292 fail (96.2%). 0 regressions from HAVING/Volcano/extraction changes. All HAVING, Volcano, CTE, join, set-ops, explain, groupby tests pass clean. 292 failures are pre-existing: unimplemented math functions (LN,LOG,SIGN), decorrelation edge cases, date functions. 40 crash files mostly stress/benchmark tests.

queue.summary: Assessed extraction roadmap. Priority: index-advisor (70 LOC) → merge (60 LOC) → prepared-stmts (100 LOC) → savepoints (100 LOC) → FK cascades (100 LOC) → constraints (100 LOC). Low-risk first, hot paths last.

queue.task: Evaluate Volcano CTE routing — 14x speedup potential. Worth doing now or after extraction?
queue.summary: Evaluated Volcano CTE routing. Verdict: 3 known Volcano correctness bugs (GROUP BY CASE, subquery ORDER BY, derived UNION) should take priority over performance optimization. Redirect T10 plan to fix GROUP BY CASE bug first — its a real data loss issue.

queue.goal: Volcano CTE routing: route CTEs through Volcano planner for 14x speedup (5ms vs 70ms)
queue.summary: Redirected plan from CTE routing to Volcano correctness fixes. 3 BUILD tasks: GROUP BY CASE bug, subquery ORDER BY crash, derived UNION support.

queue.task: Fix Volcano GROUP BY CASE expression bug — HashAggregate losing rows when GROUP BY key is CASE WHEN
queue.summary: GROUP BY CASE bug already fixed (likely from HAVING rewrite). Verified: X=2,Y=4 correct. case-groupby.test.js 0 failures.

queue.task: Fix Volcano subquery in ORDER BY crash — ORDER BY (SELECT MAX(val)...) - val
queue.summary: Subquery in ORDER BY no longer crashes (fixed in prior sessions). Both legacy and Volcano return same results — subquery not fully evaluated in ORDER BY is a pre-existing limitation, not Volcano-specific.

queue.task: Fix Volcano derived table with UNION — FROM (SELECT ... UNION ALL SELECT ...) sub
queue.summary: Derived table with UNION already works in Volcano. Both engines produce same results. derived-table-volcano.test.js: 0 failures.

queue.summary: Git push done. Dashboard updated.

queue.task: Mid-day reflection: extraction quality, test coverage, any surprising bugs?
queue.summary: Mid-session reflection: 13 tasks done. 3 extractions, 0 regressions. Surprise: macOS lacks timeout cmd (cost 45min). All 3 Volcano gaps pre-resolved. Quality good, extraction pattern solid.

queue.goal: Neural-net: GAN output activation fix + full backprop CharLM with AdamW
queue.summary: Planned 2 tasks: GAN activation fix + GAN tests, CharLM AdamW stress test. AdamW was fixed yesterday. GAN has sigmoid-only output (should be configurable).

queue.task: Fix GAN generator output activation: add configurable activation (tanh/sigmoid/none), write GAN test suite
queue.summary: GAN: added configurable generatorOutputActivation (tanh/sigmoid/linear/none) and lossType. Wrote 12-test suite: all pass. Tests cover shape, loss convergence, tanh range, simple distribution learning.

queue.task: Stress-test CharLM with AdamW on Shakespeare: verify convergence, sample quality, learning rate scheduling
queue.summary: CharLM AdamW integration: 22.4% loss improvement over SGD in 200 steps. Added optimizer param to train() and updateAdamW() method. Warmup scheduling support via adamw-warmup.

queue.task: Git commit+push, dashboard, knowledge capture
queue.summary: Git push done.

queue.task: Evaluate parser inconsistency (aggregate arg sometimes string, sometimes object). Systemic fix?
queue.summary: Evaluated parser inconsistency. Decision: not worth a systemic fix now. Documented pattern works (typeof x === object ? x.name : x). Added to TODO.md Low priority. A normalizeArg() utility would help but is low-ROI vs active features.

queue.goal: HenryDB Volcano correlated subquery support (see scratch/volcano-gaps.md)
queue.summary: Found real correlated IN subquery bug: both engines return all 4 rows when only 2 should match. Subquery correlation columns not being substituted. 1 BUILD task to fix.

queue.task: Fix correlated IN subquery bug: correlation columns not being substituted, returns all aggregated values instead of group-specific value
queue.summary: Fixed correlated IN subquery bug! Root cause: batch decorrelation missing GROUP BY + column alias resolution. Fix: SQL string generation with explicit GROUP BY. Both engines correct. Volcano gains CORRELATED_IN_HASHMAP. Pre-existing stress test: 7→6 failures (1 fixed).

queue.task: Git commit+push, dashboard update
queue.summary: Git push done.

queue.task: Research vectorized execution for JS engines — read scratch/vectorized-execution-explore.md, compare with DuckDB approach
queue.summary: Reviewed vectorized execution research. Key: 2.85-5.8x speedup for deep pipelines. Hybrid Volcano-vectorized (batch 1024 rows internally) is the right approach. Priority: after extraction and correctness work completes.

queue.task: Deep-dive: AST format normalization strategies. Can we unify parser output to prevent future mismatch bugs?
queue.summary: AST normalization: only 6 string/object mismatch sites across codebase. A normalizeArg() utility post-parse would be ~20 LOC. Low priority — existing workarounds work. Could prevent future bugs but ROI is marginal.

queue.task: Depth check: 8 BUILD tasks done. Any surprises? What did I learn? Plan next extraction batch.
queue.summary: Depth check passes all 3 criteria: surprise (correlated IN bug root cause), learning (implicit GROUP BY in decorrelation), bug found (data correctness). Not in breadth spiral.

queue.summary: Extracted fk-cascade.js (115 LOC) from db.js. FK CASCADE/SET NULL/RESTRICT for DELETE+UPDATE. All FK tests pass. db.js now 3057 lines.

queue.goal: Neural-net: implement Attention Sink for long context + KV cache optimization
queue.summary: Attention Sink + KV cache already implemented. Redirected to BPE tokenizer + cosine annealing LR schedule.

queue.task: Implement BPE tokenizer for neural-net: byte-pair encoding with merge rules, train on text corpus, encode/decode
queue.summary: Implemented BPE tokenizer from scratch. Sennrich et al. 2016 algorithm. GPT-2 pre-tokenization, train/encode/decode/serialize/fromJSON. 12 tests all pass. Shakespeare compresses significantly with perfect roundtrip.

queue.task: Add cosine annealing LR schedule to CharLM, test on Shakespeare corpus for improved convergence
queue.summary: Added cosine annealing LR schedule to CharLM. Options: cosine, cosine-warmup. Warmup enables 3x higher peak LR safely. 3.6% loss improvement. All 13 CharLM tests pass.

queue.summary: Extracted constraint-validator.js (120 LOC) from db.js. All constraint/FK tests pass. db.js now 2940 lines — under 3000 milestone!

queue.goal: HenryDB: fix remaining decorrelation stress test failures — investigate root causes of 6 pre-existing failures
queue.summary: Categorized 6 decorrelation failures: (1) self-reference nested correlation, (2) multi-column correlation, (3) NOT IN with JOIN, (4) aggregate with nested correlation, (5) correlated vs uncorrelated parity, (6) NULL handling. Root cause: batch decorrelation only handles simple single-table single-predicate cases.

queue.task: Fix NOT IN correlated subquery with JOIN: batch decorrelation needs to handle JOIN + multi-predicate correlation
queue.summary: Fixed batch decorrelation: (1) WHERE clause was hardcoding = for all predicates (< became =), (2) JOINs not included in SQL. Added serializeExpr() utility. Stress test: 6→3 failures. 3 tests fixed: self-reference, multi-column, NOT IN with JOIN.

queue.task: Fix multi-column correlation: batch decorrelation with composite key lookup
queue.summary: Multi-column correlation already fixed by T40 operator preservation. Test passes.
